Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Looks like you've recovered. I'm glad to see that.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 0 25 25}There are some things I need to discuss with you. That's why I asked you to see me so soon after your discharge from the hospital.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}I believe I mentioned his name before, but this is Sanada-kun.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Okay, let me start off by asking you this...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Would you believe me if I said that a day consists of more than 24 hours?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Heh, that's a reasonable reaction.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}However, you've already experienced this truth firsthand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Do you remember the night you first arrived here?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}You had to have noticed the signs.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}Streetlights going out... Things that stopped working... The inexplicable appearance of coffins...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}With so many things amiss, didn't it feel like you'd stepped into a different time?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}That's the {f 0 1 33}Dark Hour{f 0 1 27}—a time period hidden between one day and the next.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}I guess it's more like something people simply aren't cognizant of.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}But the Dark Hour does exist, and it occurs each night at midnight.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}It will happen tonight, and every night to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}It occurs each night, as the clock strikes twelve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}It will happen tonight, and every night to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I know how you feel. Who would believe such a fantastical claim?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}But the Dark Hour does exist, and it occurs each night as the clock strikes twelve.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}It will happen tonight, and every night to come.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Normal people don't realize it, since they're all sleeping inside their coffins.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}But that's not what makes the Dark Hour so interesting.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}You saw them... Those creatures.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}They only appear during the Dark Hour and attack anyone who roams free outside the coffins.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}{f 4 23 0 4 1 25 25}It's our job to defeat them. Pretty exciting, huh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Akihiko! Why are you always like this?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}You just got hurt the other day![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Now, now. He does his work well, in any case.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}We are the {f 0 1 33}Specialized Extracurricular Execution Squad{f 0 1 27}—SEES for short.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}On paper, we're classified as a school club. But in reality, this group is dedicated to defeating the Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}Mitsuru Kirijo-kun is the leader, and I'm the club advisor.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}A Shadow feeds on the mind of its prey; the victim becomes a living corpse.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}{f 0 1 33}Apathy Syndrome{f 0 1 27}—I'm sure you've heard of it. We sometimes refer to those who suffer from this as "the Lost."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}They're responsible for most of the incidents on the news, if not all of them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}Unfortunately, the police can't do a thing during the Dark Hour...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}Although rare, there are those who can function during the Dark Hour.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}Some may even awaken to a power that enables them to fight Shadows.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}That's known as "{f 0 1 33}Persona{f 0 1 27}"—the power you called upon the other night.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}Shadows can only be defeated by Persona-users.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}That means you are the only ones who stand a chance against them.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I'm glad you're quick to understand.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}What he's trying to say is, we want you to join us.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 49 0 0}We've prepared an {f 0 1 33}Evoker{f 0 1 27} for you. We'd like you to lend us your strength.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}I'm glad to hear you're on board.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 4 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Don't think too hard on it. Just hang out with us for a while.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}Wait, don't pressure him like that! What if he feels like he can't say no?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}I mean, I'd like it if he joined too, but...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_029_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}If you have any questions, don't hesitate to ask.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}Whew... I was afraid you wouldn't do it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 2 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 60 0 0}I'm glad to hear you're on board.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_031_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 61 0 0}We really appreciate it. If you have any questions, don't hesitate to ask.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_032_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 63 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 0 25 25}Oh, I almost forgot. About your room assignment...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 64 0 0}Why don't you just stay in the room you have now?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 65 0 0}{f 4 23 0 222 1 25 25}I don't know what the holdup is, but I guess it worked out in the end! Hahahaha![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I joined SEES to fight the Shadows...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_035_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I can hear a voice ringing inside my head...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_036_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I feel my inner strength growing...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I recall what Igor said about[n]the power of Social Links.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 69 0 0}I'll follow up with you regarding our "club activities" later on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_037_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 70 0 0}I apologize for gathering you all here on your precious day off.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 71 0 0}Tomorrow is Sunday, so take some time to relax.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_038_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 222 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 73 0 0}You know, because it's the weekend?[n]{f 1 1}
